title: Error handling silently swallows failures
description: Multiple places use unwrap_or_default(), unwrap_or((0,)), or let _ = to silently discard errors. Locations: server.rs inbox Follow handler (let _ = sqlx insert), server.rs Accept send (let _ = client.post), delivery.rs process_batch (unwrap_or_default on post query). These hide bugs. At minimum, log errors with tracing::error! instead of silently discarding.
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
